function.name: calculate_bmi
function.long_description: Calculates the Body Mass Index (BMI) using weight and height and classifies the result into standard health categories.
example_user_queries: Calculate BMI for 68 kg and 172 cm.
What is the BMI of someone who weighs 82 kg and is 180 cm tall?
Compute BMI for weight 54 kg and height 160 cm.
Find my BMI if I am 95 kg and 178 cm.
Check BMI for 73.5 kg at 169 cm height.
Calculate body mass index with weight_kg 61 and height_cm 165.
What BMI do I get for 88 kg and 184 cm?
Work out BMI for a person weighing 47 kg and standing 154 cm tall.
Tell me the BMI for 102 kg and 191 cm.
Estimate BMI using 58 kg and 163 cm.
